verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: To Simon was allotted Rome, and to John Ephesus; to Thomas India, and to Addæus the country of the Assyrians.

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: And, when they were sent each one of them to the district which had been allotted to him, they devoted themselves to bring the several countries to discipleship.
